title: Report: House AI Talks Target Calif., NY Frontier Safety Laws
description: With a two-year window before states could regulate top developers again, Bipartisan House negotiators are converging on a federal artificial intelligence bill that would block California and New York from enforcing their new frontier AI safety laws.

title: OpenAI Bought Company That Offered A.I. Tools for Cloning Voices
description: The acquisition, Weights.gg, was a sort of social network for creating and sharing artificial intelligence algorithms.

title: Why AI safety controls are not very effective
description: SAN FRANCISCO – When companies like Anthropic, Google and OpenAI build their artificial intelligence systems, they spend months adding ways to prevent people from using their technology to spread disinformation, build weapons or hack into computer networks.

title: Markets drop worldwide as oil prices rattle bond market
description: NEW YORK — The U.S. stock market fell from its records Friday and joined a worldwide drop for stocks after higher oil prices sent a shiver through the bond market. Stocks that had been caught up in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology led the way lower. The S&P 500 fell 1.2% from its all-time high […]

title: A closer look at the AI hype train
